prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high-endurance athlete requiring 4000+ calories with carbohydrate and hydration focus

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 4000+ calories with carbohydrates comprising 55-65% of total calories
Includes 3 main meals and 2-3 snacks distributed throughout the day
Contains specific hydration strategy with water and electrolyte recommendations
Presented in compact, easy-to-read format suitable for a single day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 4000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrates and hydration strategies

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and strength through powerlifting training with high protein intake

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains at least 200g of protein distributed across all meals
Includes pre-workout and post-workout meals with appropriate timing and macronutrient composition
Plan is compact and concise (fits within 1 day format with 4-5 meals maximum)
All meals are realistic and practical for a single athlete to prepare
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing high protein intake (200g+) with specific meal timing around workouts

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain weight at 70 kg for lightweight boxing division while maximizing energy and strength for training
prompt_inputs.restrictions: No dairy due to lactose intolerance

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals approximately 2,100-2,300 calories to support gradual 1 kg weight loss while maintaining performance
Includes 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day with balanced macronutrients (protein-focused for muscle retention)
All meals are dairy-free and practical for an athlete's training schedule
Plan is presented in compact, easy-to-follow 1-day format with meal times and portion sizes
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport with strict weight class requirements (boxer/wrestler) needing calorie control while maintaining performance and energy

solution_criteria: All meals are 100% plant-based with no animal products
Includes adequate plant-based protein sources at each meal (legumes, tofu, nuts, seeds)
Covers essential micronutrients for athletes (iron, B12, calcium, zinc) through food sources or notes supplementation
Provides a realistic 1-day meal plan with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with dietary restrictions: vegan athlete requiring plant-based protein sources and micronutrient optimization

prompt_inputs.restrictions: vegetarian, no nuts or tree nuts

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals using budget-friendly whole foods (rice, beans, eggs, seasonal vegetables, oats)
Total prep time across all meals does not exceed 45 minutes
Meets estimated daily caloric needs for a 75kg endurance athlete (approximately 2400-2800 calories)
All meals comply with vegetarian and nut-free restrictions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with minimal budget constraints: athlete needing economical, accessible whole foods with practical prep time limitations
